title: Groom dies in air crash moments after departing wedding, while ‘devastated’ bride miraculously survives
description: "When she touched him, she called out to him. He was already cold."
content:
A Georgia groom fretted about the fog before being tragically killed in a helicopter crash moments after leaving his own wedding while his bride miraculously survived with only cuts and bruises.
Dav… [+2433 chars]
de: Der Bräutigam stirbt kurz nach der Hochzeit bei einem Flugzeugabsturz, während die „am Boden zerstörte“ Braut wie durch ein Wunder überlebt. „Als sie ihn berührte, rief sie nach ihm. Ihm war schon kalt.“
en: Groom dies in air crash moments after departing wedding, while ‘devastated’ bride miraculously survives. "When she touched him, she called out to him. He was already cold."
la: Sponsus in caeli fragore momentis post nuptias discedentibus moritur, dum 'sponsus vastata est mirabiliter superstes'. "Cum tetigisset eum, clamavit ad eum. Jam frigidus erat."
